basics.name: Atheesh Alva
basics.label: Flutter Engineer  ·  API Development  ·  Amazon Web Services
basics.summary: Results-driven Flutter Engineer with 6+ years of hands-on experience delivering cross-platform mobile applications for Android and iOS. Skilled in designing and building RESTful APIs, managing relational databases with MySQL, and deploying cloud infrastructure on Amazon Web Services.

work.name: Your Current Company
highlights: Architected and shipped three production Flutter applications serving 50,000+ active users across Android and iOS platforms.
Designed and maintained RESTful APIs using Node.js, reducing average response latency by 42 percent through MySQL query optimization and indexing strategies.
Migrated on-premise backend services to AWS EC2 and RDS, improving system uptime from 97 percent to 99.9 percent.
Implemented BLoC state management pattern across all applications, achieving clean separation of UI and business logic layers.
Integrated Firebase Authentication, Crashlytics, and FCM push notifications across all products.

work.name: Your Previous Company
highlights: Built cross-platform mobile applications from concept to release using Flutter, collaborating with design team to deliver pixel-accurate interfaces.
Developed and integrated REST APIs and authored optimized MySQL stored procedures and database views.
Established a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, compressing release cycles from two weeks to three days.
Deployed and managed static assets using AWS S3 and CloudFront CDN.

certificates.name: Flutter and Dart – The Complete Guide

projects.name: Inventory Tracking System
projects.description: End-to-end warehouse management application with real-time stock tracking, barcode scanning, PDF reporting, and role-based access control. REST API backend with 35+ endpoints deployed on AWS RDS and EC2.

projects.name: Real-Time Chat Platform
projects.description: Feature-rich messaging application with encrypted chats, media sharing, read receipts, and push notifications. WebSocket server on AWS EC2 handles 10,000 concurrent connections.

projects.name: Healthcare Patient Portal
projects.description: Patient-doctor appointment booking platform with scheduling, prescription management, and PDF generation. Serverless report processing via AWS Lambda reduces infrastructure costs by 60 percent.

awards.title: Best Application Award – Internal Hackathon 2023
awards.summary: Built a real-time fleet tracking application in 24 hours using Flutter and AWS Location Services. Won among 18 competing teams.

awards.title: Open Source Contributor
awards.summary: Merged three pull requests into official Flutter ecosystem packages including flutter_local_notifications and the Dio HTTP client.

awards.title: Technical Author
awards.summary: Published 12 in-depth articles on Flutter architecture and AWS integration, accumulating over 4,000 followers.
